---
title: "CCP_generation_Modul_5c(y4)"
subtitle: "Adjacent Paragraph Lemma Overlap"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-fold: false
    code-tools: true
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

# MODUL 5c — Adjacent paragraph lemma overlap

This module computes the cohesion measure \(y_4\).

The measure captures lexical continuity between adjacent paragraphs by
calculating all-lemma overlap between paragraph \(P_i\) and paragraph
\(P_{i+1}\).

The module reads existing prepared outputs and does not regenerate any
previous CCP layers.

# MODUL 5c 1 — Setup

```{r}
# MODUL 5c1 — Setup

# MODUL 5c1 — Setup

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(readr)
library(stringr)
library(tibble)

data_prep_dir <- "../data_prep_CCP_output"
module_5b_output_dir <- "../measure_outputs"
module_5c_output_dir <- "../measure_outputs"

dir.create(
  module_5c_output_dir,
  showWarnings = FALSE,
  recursive = TRUE
)
```

# MODUL 5c2 — Read prepared parsed token data

```{r}
# MODUL 5c2 — Read prepared parsed token data

current_texts_parsed <- readRDS(
  file.path(
    data_prep_dir,
    "current_texts_parsed.rds"
  )
)

current_texts_parsed
```

# MODUL 5c3 — Read completed MODUL 5b profile

```{r}
# MODUL 5c3 — Read completed MODUL 5b profile

ccp_module_5b <- readRDS(
  file.path(
    module_5b_output_dir,
    "ccp_module_5b_tokens.rds"
  )
)

ccp_module_5b
```
# Inspection cell

```{r}
# Inspect available column names

names(current_texts_parsed)

grep(
  "lemma|token|paragraph|sentence|pos",
  names(current_texts_parsed),
  value = TRUE,
  ignore.case = TRUE
)
```
# 

```{r}
# MODUL 5c4 — Inspect available prepared files

list.files(
  data_prep_dir,
  full.names = FALSE
)
```

# MODUL 5c4 — Read preserved paragraph layer

```{r}
# MODUL 5c4 — Read preserved paragraph layer

current_paragraph_layer <- readRDS(
  file.path(
    data_prep_dir,
    "current_paragraph_layer.rds"
  )
)

glimpse(current_paragraph_layer)

names(current_paragraph_layer)

current_paragraph_layer |>
  slice_head(n = 20)
```


# 

```{r}
# MODUL 5c5 — 
# MODUL 5c5 — Check preserved paragraph structure

names(current_paragraph_layer)

y4_paragraph_structure <- current_paragraph_layer |>
  group_by(text_id) |>
  summarise(
    n_paragraphs = n(),
    n_adjacent_paragraph_pairs = pmax(n_paragraphs - 1L, 0L),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

print(y4_paragraph_structure)


```


# 

```{r}
# MODUL 5c8 — Load German UDPipe model

library(udpipe)

model_dir <- "../models"

model_file <- list.files(
  model_dir,
  pattern = "german-hdt.*\\.udpipe$",
  full.names = TRUE
)

if (length(model_file) == 0) {
  stop(
    "German UDPipe model not found in: ",
    normalizePath(model_dir, mustWork = FALSE)
  )
}

model_file <- model_file[1]

cat("Using UDPipe model:\n")
cat(normalizePath(model_file), "\n")

ud_model <- udpipe_load_model(model_file)
```
```{r}
# MODUL 5c9 — Parse preserved paragraph texts

message(
  "Parsing ",
  nrow(current_paragraph_layer),
  " preserved paragraphs..."
)

y4_paragraphs_annotated_raw <- udpipe_annotate(
  ud_model,
  x = current_paragraph_layer$paragraph_text,
  doc_id = current_paragraph_layer$paragraph_id
)

y4_paragraphs_parsed <- as.data.frame(
  y4_paragraphs_annotated_raw
)

glimpse(y4_paragraphs_parsed)
```
# 
```{r}
# MODUL 5c10 — Reconnect parsed lemmas to paragraph metadata

y4_paragraph_tokens <- y4_paragraphs_parsed |>
  rename(
    paragraph_id = doc_id,
    udpipe_paragraph_id = paragraph_id
  ) |>
  left_join(
    current_paragraph_layer |>
      select(
        text_id,
        model,
        paragraph_id,
        paragraph_number
      ),
    by = "paragraph_id"
  ) |>
  select(
    text_id,
    model,
    paragraph_id,
    paragraph_number,
    sentence_id,
    token_id,
    token,
    lemma,
    upos
  ) |>
  arrange(
    text_id,
    paragraph_number,
    sentence_id,
    suppressWarnings(as.integer(token_id))
  )

glimpse(y4_paragraph_tokens)
```
#

```{r}
 # MODUL 5c11 — Check paragraph metadata join

y4_join_check <- y4_paragraph_tokens |>
  summarise(
    n_tokens = n(),
    n_missing_text_id = sum(is.na(text_id)),
    n_missing_paragraph_number = sum(is.na(paragraph_number))
  )

print(y4_join_check)
```
# 

```{r}
# MODUL 5c12 — Create all-word-lemma layer

y4_all_lemma_tokens <- y4_paragraph_tokens |>
  mutate(
    lemma_y4 = lemma |>
      as.character() |>
      str_to_lower() |>
      str_squish()
  ) |>
  filter(
    !is.na(lemma_y4),
    lemma_y4 != "",
    lemma_y4 != "null",
    upos != "PUNCT"
  ) |>
  select(
    text_id,
    model,
    paragraph_id,
    paragraph_number,
    sentence_id,
    token_id,
    token,
    lemma_y4,
    upos
  ) |>
  arrange(
    text_id,
    paragraph_number,
    sentence_id,
    suppressWarnings(as.integer(token_id))
  )

glimpse(y4_all_lemma_tokens)
```
#

```{r}
sum(y4_all_lemma_tokens$upos == "PUNCT")
```

#

```{r}
# MODUL 5c13 — Build paragraph lemma sets

y4_paragraph_lemma_sets <- y4_all_lemma_tokens |>
  group_by(
    text_id,
    model,
    paragraph_id,
    paragraph_number
  ) |>
  summarise(
    n_lemma_tokens = n(),
    n_unique_lemmas = n_distinct(lemma_y4),
    lemma_set = list(sort(unique(lemma_y4))),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  arrange(
    text_id,
    paragraph_number
  )

y4_paragraph_lemma_sets |>
  select(
    text_id,
    paragraph_id,
    paragraph_number,
    n_lemma_tokens,
    n_unique_lemmas
  ) |>
  print(n = Inf)
```

#

```{r}
# MODUL 5c14 — Create adjacent paragraph pairs

y4_adjacent_paragraph_pairs <- y4_paragraph_lemma_sets |>
  arrange(
    text_id,
    paragraph_number
  ) |>
  group_by(
    text_id,
    model
  ) |>
  mutate(
    next_paragraph_id = lead(paragraph_id),
    next_paragraph_number = lead(paragraph_number),
    next_n_lemma_tokens = lead(n_lemma_tokens),
    next_n_unique_lemmas = lead(n_unique_lemmas),
    next_lemma_set = lead(lemma_set)
  ) |>
  filter(
    !is.na(next_paragraph_id)
  ) |>
  ungroup()

y4_adjacent_paragraph_pairs |>
  select(
    text_id,
    paragraph_id,
    paragraph_number,
    next_paragraph_id,
    next_paragraph_number,
    n_unique_lemmas,
    next_n_unique_lemmas
  ) |>
  print(n = Inf, width = Inf)
```


#

```{r}
y4_adjacent_paragraph_pairs |>
  count(
    text_id,
    name = "n_adjacent_paragraph_pairs"
  )
```
# y4 - Computation

```{r}
# MODUL 5c15 — Compute adjacent-paragraph lemma overlap

y4_pairwise_overlap <- y4_adjacent_paragraph_pairs |>
  mutate(
    shared_lemmas = map2(
      lemma_set,
      next_lemma_set,
      intersect
    ),
    union_lemmas = map2(
      lemma_set,
      next_lemma_set,
      union
    ),
    n_shared_lemmas = map_int(
      shared_lemmas,
      length
    ),
    n_union_lemmas = map_int(
      union_lemmas,
      length
    ),
    y4_jaccard_overlap = if_else(
      n_union_lemmas > 0,
      n_shared_lemmas / n_union_lemmas,
      NA_real_
    ),
    y4_smaller_set_overlap = if_else(
      pmin(
        n_unique_lemmas,
        next_n_unique_lemmas
      ) > 0,
      n_shared_lemmas /
        pmin(
          n_unique_lemmas,
          next_n_unique_lemmas
        ),
      NA_real_
    )
  )

y4_pairwise_overlap |>
  select(
    text_id,
    paragraph_id,
    next_paragraph_id,
    n_unique_lemmas,
    next_n_unique_lemmas,
    n_shared_lemmas,
    n_union_lemmas,
    y4_jaccard_overlap,
    y4_smaller_set_overlap
  ) |>
  print(
    n = Inf,
    width = Inf
  )
```

#

```{r}
# MODUL 5c16 — Summarise y4 by text

y4_text_profile <- y4_pairwise_overlap |>
  group_by(
    text_id,
    model
  ) |>
  summarise(
    n_adjacent_paragraph_pairs = n(),
    y4_adjacent_paragraph_overlap_mean = mean(
      y4_jaccard_overlap,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    y4_adjacent_paragraph_overlap_min = min(
      y4_jaccard_overlap,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    y4_adjacent_paragraph_overlap_max = max(
      y4_jaccard_overlap,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    y4_smaller_set_overlap_mean = mean(
      y4_smaller_set_overlap,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

print(y4_text_profile, width = Inf)
```
```{r}
# MODUL 5c16 — Create content-word lemma layer

y4_content_lemma_tokens <- y4_paragraph_tokens |>
  mutate(
    lemma_y4_content = lemma |>
      as.character() |>
      str_to_lower() |>
      str_squish()
  ) |>
  filter(
    !is.na(lemma_y4_content),
    lemma_y4_content != "",
    lemma_y4_content != "null",
    upos %in% c("NOUN", "VERB", "ADJ", "ADV")
  ) |>
  select(
    text_id,
    model,
    paragraph_id,
    paragraph_number,
    sentence_id,
    token_id,
    token,
    lemma_y4_content,
    upos
  ) |>
  arrange(
    text_id,
    paragraph_number,
    sentence_id,
    suppressWarnings(as.integer(token_id))
  )

glimpse(y4_content_lemma_tokens)
```

```{r}
# MODUL 5c17 — Build content-word lemma sets

y4_content_paragraph_sets <- y4_content_lemma_tokens |>
  group_by(
    text_id,
    model,
    paragraph_id,
    paragraph_number
  ) |>
  summarise(
    n_content_lemma_tokens = n(),
    n_unique_content_lemmas = n_distinct(lemma_y4_content),
    content_lemma_set = list(sort(unique(lemma_y4_content))),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  arrange(
    text_id,
    paragraph_number
  )
```

#

```{r}
# MODUL 5c18 — Compute adjacent content-word overlap

y4_content_pairwise_overlap <- y4_content_paragraph_sets |>
  group_by(
    text_id,
    model
  ) |>
  arrange(
    paragraph_number,
    .by_group = TRUE
  ) |>
  mutate(
    next_paragraph_id = lead(paragraph_id),
    next_paragraph_number = lead(paragraph_number),
    next_n_unique_content_lemmas = lead(n_unique_content_lemmas),
    next_content_lemma_set = lead(content_lemma_set)
  ) |>
  filter(
    !is.na(next_paragraph_id)
  ) |>
  ungroup() |>
  mutate(
    shared_content_lemmas = map2(
      content_lemma_set,
      next_content_lemma_set,
      intersect
    ),
    union_content_lemmas = map2(
      content_lemma_set,
      next_content_lemma_set,
      union
    ),
    n_shared_content_lemmas = map_int(
      shared_content_lemmas,
      length
    ),
    n_union_content_lemmas = map_int(
      union_content_lemmas,
      length
    ),
    y4_content_jaccard = if_else(
      n_union_content_lemmas > 0,
      n_shared_content_lemmas / n_union_content_lemmas,
      NA_real_
    ),
    y4_content_smaller_set_overlap = if_else(
      pmin(
        n_unique_content_lemmas,
        next_n_unique_content_lemmas
      ) > 0,
      n_shared_content_lemmas /
        pmin(
          n_unique_content_lemmas,
          next_n_unique_content_lemmas
        ),
      NA_real_
    )
  )
```

#


```{r}
# MODUL 5c19 — Summarise content-word y4

y4_content_text_profile <- y4_content_pairwise_overlap |>
  group_by(
    text_id,
    model
  ) |>
  summarise(
    n_adjacent_paragraph_pairs = n(),
    y4_content_overlap_mean = mean(
      y4_content_jaccard,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    y4_content_overlap_min = min(
      y4_content_jaccard,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    y4_content_overlap_max = max(
      y4_content_jaccard,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    y4_content_smaller_set_overlap_mean = mean(
      y4_content_smaller_set_overlap,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

print(y4_content_text_profile, width = Inf)
```
#

```{r}
y4_comparison_table <- y4_text_profile |>
  select(
    text_id,
    model,
    y4_all_lemma_overlap_mean =
      y4_adjacent_paragraph_overlap_mean
  ) |>
  left_join(
    y4_content_text_profile |>
      select(
        text_id,
        y4_content_overlap_mean
      ),
    by = "text_id"
  )

print(y4_comparison_table, width = Inf)
```
# MODUL 5c20 — Create paragraph lemma–POS sets

```{r}
# MODUL 5c20 — Create paragraph lemma–POS sets

y4_paragraph_lemma_pos <- y4_all_lemma_tokens |>
  distinct(
    text_id,
    model,
    paragraph_id,
    paragraph_number,
    lemma_y4,
    upos
  ) |>
  arrange(
    text_id,
    paragraph_number,
    lemma_y4,
    upos
  )

glimpse(y4_paragraph_lemma_pos)
```

# MODUL 5c20 — Create paragraph lemma–POS sets

```{r}
# MODUL 5c21 — Identify lemmas shared by adjacent paragraphs

y4_transferred_lemmas <- y4_paragraph_lemma_pos |>
  transmute(
    text_id,
    model,
    paragraph_id_1 = paragraph_id,
    paragraph_number_1 = paragraph_number,
    lemma = lemma_y4,
    upos
  ) |>
  inner_join(
    y4_paragraph_lemma_pos |>
      transmute(
        text_id,
        paragraph_id_2 = paragraph_id,
        paragraph_number_2 = paragraph_number,
        lemma = lemma_y4,
        upos
      ),
    by = c(
      "text_id",
      "lemma",
      "upos"
    ),
    relationship = "many-to-many"
  ) |>
  filter(
    paragraph_number_2 == paragraph_number_1 + 1L
  ) |>
  mutate(
    lemma_group = case_when(
      upos %in% c("NOUN", "VERB", "ADJ", "ADV") ~
        "content_word",
      upos == "PRON" ~
        "pronoun",
      TRUE ~
        "other_function_word"
    )
  ) |>
  distinct(
    text_id,
    model,
    paragraph_id_1,
    paragraph_number_1,
    paragraph_id_2,
    paragraph_number_2,
    lemma,
    upos,
    lemma_group
  ) |>
  arrange(
    text_id,
    paragraph_number_1,
    lemma_group,
    upos,
    lemma
  )

glimpse(y4_transferred_lemmas)
```
# Note: P01 → P02
P02 → P03
P03 → P04
...

# MODUL 5c22 — Count transferred lemmas by category

```{r}
# MODUL 5c22 — Count transferred lemmas by category

y4_transfer_by_group <- y4_transferred_lemmas |>
  count(
    text_id,
    model,
    paragraph_id_1,
    paragraph_id_2,
    lemma_group,
    name = "n_shared_lemmas"
  ) |>
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from = lemma_group,
    values_from = n_shared_lemmas,
    values_fill = 0,
    names_prefix = "n_shared_"
  )

print(
  y4_transfer_by_group,
  n = Inf,
  width = Inf
)
```
# Note: This shows, for each paragraph transition:

n_shared_content_word
n_shared_pronoun
n_shared_other_function_word


# Note: Here, n_adjacent_transitions tells us across how many paragraph boundaries a lemma was transferred. For example:
Arbeit       NOUN   3 transitions
Digitalisierung NOUN 2 transitions
verändern    VERB   2 transitions

# 
# 

```{r}
# MODUL 5c23 — Compact noun, pronoun, and adverb diagnostics

pron_classification <- tribble(
  ~upos,   ~lemma,  ~pronoun_form_group,
  "PRON",  "die",   "potential_nominal_or_relative_reference",
  "PRON",  "sein",  "potential_possessive_reference",
  "PRON",  "es",    "referential_or_nonreferential_ambiguous",
  "PRON",  "sich",  "reflexive",
  "PRON",  "wir",   "speaker_group_reference",
  "PRON",  "unser", "speaker_group_possessive_reference",
  "PRON",  "man",   "indefinite_generic_reference",
  "PRON",  "wer",   "interrogative_or_relative_reference",
  "PRON",  "was",   "interrogative_relative_or_propositional_reference"
)

y4_handover_diagnostics <- y4_transferred_lemmas |>
  left_join(
    pron_classification,
    by = c("upos", "lemma")
  ) |>
  count(
    text_id,
    model,
    upos,
    lemma,
    pronoun_form_group,
    name = "n_adjacent_transitions"
  )

y4_handover_summary <- y4_handover_diagnostics |>
  group_by(
    text_id,
    model
  ) |>
  summarise(
    noun_transition_sum = sum(
      n_adjacent_transitions[upos == "NOUN"]
    ),
    pronoun_transition_sum = sum(
      n_adjacent_transitions[upos == "PRON"]
    ),
    adverb_transition_sum = sum(
      n_adjacent_transitions[upos == "ADV"]
    ),
    potential_nominal_reference_transition_sum = sum(
      n_adjacent_transitions[
        pronoun_form_group %in% c(
          "potential_nominal_or_relative_reference",
          "potential_possessive_reference"
        )
      ],
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  mutate(
    noun_to_potential_pronoun_ratio = if_else(
      potential_nominal_reference_transition_sum > 0,
      noun_transition_sum /
        potential_nominal_reference_transition_sum,
      NA_real_
    )
  )

print(
  y4_handover_summary,
  n = Inf,
  width = Inf
)
```

# Inspect exact transferred NOUN, PRON, and ADV lemmas

```{r}
# Inspect exact transferred NOUN, PRON, and ADV lemmas

y4_handover_diagnostics |>
  filter(
    upos %in% c("NOUN", "PRON", "ADV")
  ) |>
  arrange(
    text_id,
    upos,
    desc(n_adjacent_transitions),
    lemma
  ) |>
  print(
    n = Inf,
    width = Inf
  )
```
# Note: What the additional diagnostics can establish

They establish:

whether paragraph overlap is carried mainly by general lexical recurrence or by content words;
which nouns, pronouns, and adverbs recur across paragraph boundaries;
whether noun or pronoun forms dominate the transferred referential inventory;
whether the pattern changes across paragraph positions.

They do not establish:

that a repeated pronoun refers to the same antecedent;
that a repeated noun should have been replaced by a pronoun;
actual anaphora resolution;
a Given/New violation;
semantic continuity expressed through paraphrase.

The noun–pronoun ratio is therefore a paragraph-boundary referential-form diagnostic, not a coreference measure.

# MODUL 5c24 — Final y4 profile

```{r}

# MODUL 5c24 — Final y4 profile (old: # MODUL 5c24 — Merge final y4 bundle) with lesser columns
# MODUL 5c24 — Final y4 profile

ccp_module_5c_y4 <- y4_comparison_table |>
  left_join(
    y4_paragraph_structure,
    by = "text_id"
  ) |>
  left_join(
    y4_handover_summary,
    by = c("text_id", "model")
  ) |>
  select(
    text_id,
    model,
    n_paragraphs,
    n_adjacent_paragraph_pairs,
    y4_all_lemma_overlap_mean,
    y4_content_overlap_mean,
    noun_transition_sum,
    pronoun_transition_sum,
    adverb_transition_sum,
    potential_nominal_reference_transition_sum,
    noun_to_potential_pronoun_ratio
  ) |>
  arrange(text_id)

print(
  ccp_module_5c_y4,
  n = Inf,
  width = Inf
)
saveRDS(
  ccp_module_5c_y4,
  file.path("../measure_outputs", "ccp_module_5c_y4.rds")
)
```

# Note — Contents of the \(y_4\) bundle
The compact \(y_4\) output contains the paragraph count, the number of adjacent paragraph transitions, mean all-lemma and content-word Jaccard overlap, noun/pronoun/adverb transfer totals and means per transition, and the noun-to-potential-pronoun referential-form diagnostic.

# MODUL 5c25 — Pairwise and lemma-level diagnostics

```{r}
# MODUL 5c25 — Pairwise and lemma-level diagnostics

pair_keys <- c(
  "text_id",
  "model",
  "paragraph_id",
  "paragraph_number",
  "next_paragraph_id",
  "next_paragraph_number"
)

ccp_module_5c_y4_pairwise <- y4_pairwise_overlap |>
  select(
    all_of(pair_keys),
    n_unique_lemmas,
    next_n_unique_lemmas,
    n_shared_lemmas,
    n_union_lemmas,
    y4_jaccard_overlap
  ) |>
  left_join(
    y4_content_pairwise_overlap |>
      select(
        all_of(pair_keys),
        n_unique_content_lemmas,
        next_n_unique_content_lemmas,
        n_shared_content_lemmas,
        n_union_content_lemmas,
        y4_content_jaccard
      ),
    by = pair_keys
  ) |>
  left_join(
    y4_transfer_by_group,
    by = c(
      "text_id",
      "model",
      "paragraph_id" = "paragraph_id_1",
      "next_paragraph_id" = "paragraph_id_2"
    )
  ) |>
  mutate(
    across(
      starts_with("n_shared_"),
      ~ replace_na(.x, 0L)
    )
  ) |>
  arrange(
    text_id,
    paragraph_number
  )

ccp_module_5c_y4_lemma_audit <- y4_transferred_lemmas |>
  left_join(
    pron_classification,
    by = c("upos", "lemma")
  ) |>
  group_by(
    text_id,
    model,
    upos,
    lemma
  ) |>
  mutate(
    n_adjacent_transitions = n()
  ) |>
  ungroup() |>
  select(
    text_id,
    model,
    paragraph_id_1,
    paragraph_number_1,
    paragraph_id_2,
    paragraph_number_2,
    lemma,
    upos,
    lemma_group,
    pronoun_form_group,
    n_adjacent_transitions
  ) |>
  arrange(
    text_id,
    paragraph_number_1,
    upos,
    lemma
  )
```

# MODUL 5c26 — Validate and export y4 outputs

```{r}
# MODUL 5c26 — Validate and export y4 outputs

stopifnot(
  nrow(ccp_module_5c_y4) == 4,
  !anyDuplicated(ccp_module_5c_y4$text_id),
  nrow(ccp_module_5c_y4_pairwise) == 11,
  all(
    ccp_module_5c_y4$n_adjacent_paragraph_pairs ==
      ccp_module_5c_y4$n_paragraphs - 1L
  ),
  all(
    ccp_module_5c_y4$n_adjacent_paragraph_pairs > 0
  )
)

outputs_to_save <- list(
  ccp_module_5c_y4 =
    ccp_module_5c_y4,
  ccp_module_5c_y4_pairwise =
    ccp_module_5c_y4_pairwise,
  ccp_module_5c_y4_lemma_audit =
    ccp_module_5c_y4_lemma_audit
)

iwalk(
  outputs_to_save,
  \(object, name) {
    saveRDS(
      object,
      file.path(
        module_5c_output_dir,
        paste0(name, ".rds")
      )
    )

    write_csv(
      object,
      file.path(
        module_5c_output_dir,
        paste0(name, ".csv")
      ),
      na = ""
    )

    message(
      "Saved: ",
      name,
      ".rds/.csv"
    )
  }
)
```
# END-------------------

# ANALYTICS = > PLOTTING

#
# Load frozen y4 outputs

```{r}

if (!exists("ccp_module_5c_y4")) {
  y4_profile_path <- file.path(
    module_5c_output_dir,
    "ccp_module_5c_y4.rds"
  )

  if (!file.exists(y4_profile_path)) {
    stop("Run MODUL 5c24 and MODUL 5c26 first.")
  }

  ccp_module_5c_y4 <- readRDS(
    y4_profile_path
  )
}

if (!exists("ccp_module_5c_y4_pairwise")) {
  y4_pairwise_path <- file.path(
    module_5c_output_dir,
    "ccp_module_5c_y4_pairwise.rds"
  )

  if (!file.exists(y4_pairwise_path)) {
    stop("Run MODUL 5c25 and MODUL 5c26 first.")
  }

  ccp_module_5c_y4_pairwise <- readRDS(
    y4_pairwise_path
  )
}

```

#

```{r}

# MODUL 5c27 — Plot y4 decay

library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)

module_5c_output_dir <- "../measure_outputs"

ccp_module_5c_y4_pairwise <- readRDS(
  file.path(
    module_5c_output_dir,
    "ccp_module_5c_y4_pairwise.rds"
  )
)

y4_plot_data <- ccp_module_5c_y4_pairwise |>
  dplyr::group_by(text_id, model) |>
  dplyr::arrange(paragraph_number, .by_group = TRUE) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    normalized_position =
      (dplyr::row_number() - 1) /
      pmax(dplyr::n() - 1, 1),
    value_label = sprintf("%.3f", y4_jaccard_overlap)
  ) |>
  dplyr::ungroup()

y4_decay_plot <- ggplot(
  y4_plot_data,
  aes(normalized_position, y4_jaccard_overlap)
) +
  geom_line(
    aes(group = text_id, colour = model),
    alpha = 0.6
  ) +
  geom_point(
    aes(colour = model),
    size = 2.5
  ) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    aes(label = value_label, colour = model),
    size = 3,
    show.legend = FALSE,
    max.overlaps = Inf,
    seed = 20260714
  ) +
  geom_smooth(
    method = "lm",
    formula = y ~ x,
    se = FALSE,
    colour = "black",
    linetype = "dashed"
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ text_id, nrow = 2) +
  labs(
    x = "Normalized paragraph-transition position",
    y = "Jaccard lemma overlap (y4)",
  title = "Adjacent-paragraph lemma-overlap decay",
  subtitle = "Points: individual paragraph transitions; dashed line: linear trend over normalized position"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

ggsave(
  file.path(
    module_5c_output_dir,
    "y4_overlap_decay_plot.png"
  ),
  plot = y4_decay_plot,
  width = 10,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)

y4_decay_plot
```



## Quarto

Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see <https://quarto.org>.

## Running Code

When you click the **Render** button a document will be generated that includes both content and the output of embedded code. You can embed code like this:

```{r}
1 + 1
```

You can add options to executable code like this

```{r}
#| echo: false
2 * 2
```

The `echo: false` option disables the printing of code (only output is displayed).
